reclassification.reason: Repository evidence now includes Eclipse runtime command registry, bounded context capture, operational runtime view registry and smoke/build verification.
Repository now includes runnable TUI and Neovim MVP runtime entrypoints with smoke evidence; Vim compatibility remains explicitly deferred.

correction_note: Earlier completion claims overstated runnable client status. Runtime claims now require executable evidence, and Eclipse now qualifies as runtime_mvp while hardening tasks remain explicit.
